partial.type_support: rosidl_typesupport_c/cpp dispatched to matching introspection C/C++; non-introspection type supports are unsupported
partial.qos: KEEP_LAST, lifespan, deadline metadata, and reliability subset only
partial.wait_sets: subscriptions, services, clients, and guard conditions; QoS event readiness is cleared because no event production is implemented
partial.transport: UDP reference transport/router plus POSIX SHM local path and de-duplicated SHM-local/UDP-remote hybrid; ngtcp2/GnuTLS QUIC v1 TLS/H3 handshake, payload, FleetRMW frame, Docker/netem, ngtcp2 log telemetry, and subprocess-backed RMW publish-side QUIC gateway probes exist including async publish enqueue/drain and burst telemetry plus two-container Docker/netem single-publish and async-burst publish paths, but the RMW take path is not yet integrated with a production full-duplex QUIC backend
partial.actions: verified through rclpy action decomposition plus upstream rclcpp Nav2 lifecycle management; no dedicated native rmw_action ABI
partial.events: new message/request/response callbacks are supported; QoS event object init/fini, take-no-event, and callback setters are supported as a no-op ABI surface; event production is not implemented
partial.serialization_size: exact recursive size for statically bounded introspection C/C++ messages; artificial bounds for unbounded fields are unsupported
partial.allocations: publisher/subscription allocation init/fini are supported as no-op middleware allocations and publish/take accept allocation pointers; deep preallocation remains out of scope
partial.loaned_messages: middleware-owned publisher/subscription loan lifecycle for introspection C/C++; subscription take currently deserializes into the loan and is not zero-copy
